regime: NEUTRAL / late-cycle, complacent AI-capex melt-up over a live oil/inflation tail (macro_regime.json score 0.5475; growth+inflation both accelerating, rates neutral, credit stable, VIX ~16.8). CATALYST_WATCH flags AI-capex as THE load-bearing wall (~$725B 2026 hyperscaler capex, +77% YoY, ~40% of 2026 S&P EPS growth) and a hyperscaler-digestion air-pocket as the dominant two-sided tail; BofA FMS cash at the 3.9% sell-signal + Mag-7 ~30% of the index = little dry powder to absorb a de-grossing shock.
risk_stance: This entire 45-name book is ONE leveraged bet on AI-capex durability wearing six costumes (optical, grid, thermal, power-semi, power-gen, memory) — its diversification value is near zero because every layer resolves on the same single factor. I weight that as a CONCENTRATED, late-stage thematic bet at roughly HALF a normal theme weight: the cohort has already run 100-300% TTM, 42/45 base-case SoPs sit BELOW spot, and the load-bearing catalysts are overwhelmingly FIRED, so the asymmetry has inverted to the downside. Discipline: SEAT only the thesis-pure CORE tolls that still have demand-durability and some valuation room (anchored by the one name whose re-rate has NOT fired); size LEVER exposure smaller; HOLD-FOR-WEAKNESS the stretched/already-ran/pre-revenue names (the regime's own §5 tripwire says an AI-capex de-gross is the ENTRY, not a reason to chase strength); PASS the structurally-impaired, pre-revenue-lottery, or Skeptic-refuted names. Net book posture: defensive-selective on a fully-priced theme — buy the toll booths on the flush, do not pay up into the melt-up.
thesis_overview: The AI scale-out/scale-up build-out is real and multi-year: every incremental GPU cluster must pay a toll for optical interconnect (A), electrical distribution + grid (B), heat rejection (C), 800V-DC power conversion (D), the electrons themselves (E), and HBM (F). The durable truth is the TOLL — bandwidth-per-GPU, watts-per-rack, MW-per-campus and GB-per-accelerator all compound regardless of which chip/optic/cooler wins, and hyperscaler capex is confirmed RISING (MSFT/AMZN/GOOGL/META all guided up, not down). But the market has fully discovered this: the optical cohort, the grid cohort, the contractors, MU and the nuclear-IPP complex have all 2x-5x'd and trade above their reconciled base-case intrinsics, with catalyst_status overwhelmingly FIRED or SOFT_EXTENDED rather than PENDING_HARD. The edge left is NOT 'own the theme' (priced) but 'own the least-redundant toll with the deepest demand-durability, at the best entry, sized for a single shared factor.' So the right book is a short CORE list (seat the purest toll per layer where asymmetry or an un-substitutable moat survives a digestion air-pocket) plus a wait-list — not a 45-name index. Two names are Skeptic-REFUTED (NVTS multi-sourced + shrinking + diluting; MYRG bear-anchor stale but residual valuation-stretch verifies) and are forced TACTICAL/PASS.

assessments.role: Broadest vertically-integrated photonics platform and the InP supply node for 800G/1.6T transceivers + the NVDA CPO partner ($2B equity, supply through end-of-decade); the toll every optical-interconnect dollar pays.
assessments.scale_rationale: Purest least-redundant optical CORE alongside FN: supply-constrained (orders into CY2028, LTAs to end of decade), the 6-inch InP ramp is both the volume unlock and the GM lever. Catalyst FIRED (+171% TTM) so no near-term asymmetry, but the franchise is the one I would actually seat in the layer. Cap 35 honored.
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — DataCom 75% of revenue +40% YoY, bolted directly to hyperscaler optical capex via multi-year LTAs.

assessments.role: The indispensable outsourced optics factory — cleanest picks-and-shovels in scale-out; builds for COHR/LITE/NVDA without taking design risk.
assessments.scale_rationale: Purest least-redundant optical CORE with COHR: hard numbers (Q3 FY26 record rev +39%), no single-customer design exposure, captures the whole optical-cohort volume. Catalyst SOFT_EXTENDED, base fair $520 is ~9% below spot so the least-overpriced large optical. Cap 35 honored.
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — outsourced manufacturer to the entire optical cohort; revenue tracks aggregate scale-out volume.

assessments.role: CopperEdge / FiberEdge active-copper + optical-DSP scale-up connectivity; the one PENDING_HARD optical catalyst in the basket.
assessments.scale_rationale: The ramp is still PENDING_HARD (not fired) and base SoP ~$160 is ~the spot — the only large-optical name priced at fair value with a forward catalyst. Real levered exposure; scale in on dips. Cap 35 honored; conviction 24 on cohort-correlation risk.
assessments.demand_durability: High — active-copper + optical connectivity bolted to scale-up rack deployments; ramp still ahead, not behind.

assessments.role: Custom-silicon + interconnect (DCI/optical DSP) franchise; data center 76% of mix, the ASIC/interconnect toll alongside the merchant-GPU complex.
assessments.scale_rationale: Elite franchise but the catalyst FIRED (+300% TTM, ~30% above the $239 street target). Skeptic CONFIRMED the PASS with no fact-break — pure valuation/timing. Strong levered exposure, second-order to optics, size smaller and wait. Cap 25 honored.
assessments.demand_durability: High — data center 76% of revenue, custom AI silicon + interconnect, but more competitive/cyclical than the pure optical node.

assessments.role: AECs / active-electrical-cable + optical-DSP scale-up connectivity; FY27 >80% growth, >$600M optical guide.
assessments.scale_rationale: Quality A, levered to scale-up connectivity, but catalyst FIRED (DustPhotonics + June print) and trades above the $256 average PT. Lead-customer concentration is the kill-risk. Wait. Cap 25 honored.
assessments.demand_durability: High but customer-concentrated — revenue tightly bolted to a few hyperscaler scale-up deployments.

assessments.role: Contractually-underwritten optical-fiber/physical-layer supplier to the three largest AI-capex spenders (Meta/NVDA/Amazon LTAs).
assessments.scale_rationale: Genuinely un-substitutable fiber moat with multi-year LTAs, but every load-bearing catalyst has FIRED and base fair $150 is ~23% below spot — an AI-multiple normalization is a -49 to -56% tail. Hold for weakness. Cap 25 honored.
assessments.demand_durability: High — multi-year fiber LTAs with the top-3 spenders; partly offset by legacy display/telecom cyclicality.

assessments.role: Optical components + the second NVDA-funded transceiver supplier ($2.02B strategic investment); +90% revenue inflection.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real levered exposure but the March-entry asymmetry has INVERTED — base SoP ~$680 sits 20-25% below a ~$905 spot, ~1:3 reward:risk to the downside. Duplicative of COHR in the optical node. Wait. Cap 25 honored.
assessments.demand_durability: High — NVDA-funded transceiver supply, but margin-fade and capex-wobble sensitivity are elevated at this multiple.

assessments.role: RF/analog + optical-DSP/laser-driver components into data-center optics.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real exposure but catalyst FIRED, ~4:1 against on the base case (-45% bear vs +11% bull), base $310 is ~21% below spot. Duplicative of the optical-component cluster. Wait. Cap 18 honored.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium-high — optical-component supplier, but broader RF/defense/industrial mix dilutes the pure-capex bolt.

assessments.role: Scorpio fabric/PCIe-retimer connectivity (UALink/NVLink-Fusion optionality); largest product line by YE-2026.

assessments.role: Transceiver/laser supplier mid-ramp; design-win-dependent second-tier optical.

assessments.role: Pre-revenue photonic-interposer / optical-engine hopeful; Lumilens $500M framework is explicitly conditional.

Strong levered toll but already-ran — size smaller, wait. Cap 40 honored; conviction 28 on the steep downside tail.

Catalyst SOFT/fired, base ~$76 ~at spot. Diversified franchise cushions an air-pocket. Scale in on weakness. Cap 25 honored.

assessments.role: GaN/SiC hopeful claiming the NVDA 800V socket — but multi-sourced alongside IFNNY, revenue shrinking, serially diluting.

REFUTED forces TACTICAL/PASS; with revenue shrinking and base $11.50 ~52% below a $24 spot I take PASS. Cap 8 honored.

assessments.role: Cheapest way to own the dispatchable+nuclear power every AI dollar pays for; ~41 GW in the two highest-load-growth US markets, ~3,800 MW of 20-yr nuclear PPAs (Meta/AWS).

Skeptic proved the bull's '+22% YoY' claim was STALE — VST is actually DOWN ~7.5% YoY, ~25% off its high — which cuts FOR the thesis: the re-rate has NOT fired here. Base $165 ~at spot, bull +22-31%, and the highest Skeptic cap in the cohort (62). This is the CORE I would seat at full weight today. Cap 62 honored; conviction 40.

The least-redundant nuclear name to seat after VST. Cap 25 honored.

Whole-basket leverage plus memory-cycle leverage stacked. The June-24 print is a PENDING_HARD binary; size small and wait. Cap 18 honored.

correlation_memo: ONE BET IN SIX COSTUMES. The single shared macro factor under all 45 names is AI-capex durability (~$725B/2026 hyperscaler spend, ~40% of S&P EPS growth). A hyperscaler capex guide-down or monetization scare (CATALYST_WATCH §5 tripwire) de-grosses every layer simultaneously — there is no diversification inside this book, only the illusion of it across six sub-industries. Treat the whole complex as a single position and cap it at the LAYER level. Intra-layer clusters that share the SAME resolution driver (and are therefore mutually redundant): (A-OPTICAL) COHR + LITE + FN + CRDO + MRVL + GLW are all the NVDA/hyperscaler optical-supply node — a 1.6T transceiver ASP cut or an optical design-loss hits all six together; COHR and FN are the PUREST/least-redundant (vertically-integrated platform + the contract factory), LITE/MTSI/AAOI are duplicative second-tier transceiver exposure, POET/ALAB are the speculative tail. (B-GRID) ETN + VRT + GEV + PWR + POWL + HUBB + ABB + NVT all resolve on the SAME grid/electrical-capex cycle; ETN and GEV are the PUREST full-stack tolls, VRT is the highest-beta single-factor proxy (own ONE of VRT/ETN, not both), NVT/ATKR/MYRG are duplicative/weak. (C-THERMAL) MOD + FIX + EME + CARR + JCI are the cooling/contractor cluster on the SAME data-center build-rate; MOD is the PUREST pure-play and EME the highest-quality contractor — FIX is duplicative of EME, CARR/JCI are diluted broad-HVAC. (D-PWR-SEMI) the SiC pair ON + IFNNY share the auto-EV + AI-DC power double-secular and the SAME NVDA 800V socket (IFNNY is also the multi-source winner over NVTS); MPWR + VICR + POWI + NVTS all compete for the SAME GPU/rack power-stage socket — own ON (cheapest, broadest) and IFNNY, treat the rest as one contested socket. (E-POWER-GEN) VST + CEG + TLN + CCJ are the nuclear-IPP/uranium cluster on the SAME firm-power-PPA + uranium driver (VST and CEG are the PUREST liquid tolls; TLN duplicative, CCJ one-step-removed commodity); OKLO + SMR + XE + NNE + LEU + BWXT + BE are the pre-revenue SMR/fuel option cluster, all binary on the SAME regulatory/PPA-conversion timeline — own at most ONE (OKLO) as an option. (F-MEMORY) MU is alone but stacks AI-capex leverage ON TOP of the DRAM/HBM cycle — double-levered, not diversifying. NET: a concentrated scale-out book should hold ~6-8 names MAX across all six layers (one or two purest tolls per layer), because adding a second name per layer buys correlation, not diversification — the resolution driver is identical.
memo: SEAT TODAY (asymmetry or moat survives a digestion air-pocket): VST is the only name in the complex with genuine present asymmetry — the Skeptic proved its re-rate has NOT fired (down ~7.5% YoY, ~25% off its high), it sits at base-case fair value with +22-31% bull upside and the highest Skeptic cap (62); enter_now_carry. After that I scale_in (not full size) to the purest least-redundant toll per layer where the price is least-stretched and the moat is structural: CEG (scarcest licensed nuclear), ETN (broadest grid stack, ~fair), ON (cheapest broad power-semi, at fair value), and the COHR/FN optical-supply node + MOD (cleanest thermal) + GEV (full-stack power) on weakness. HOLD-FOR-WEAKNESS (great franchises, fired catalysts, no current asymmetry — the bulk of the book): MRVL, CRDO, GLW, LITE, MTSI, SMTC, VRT, PWR, POWL, HUBB, ABB, NVT, EME, FIX, CARR, JCI, IFNNY, ALGM, MPWR, VICR, POWI, TLN, CCJ, OKLO, BWXT, LEU, BE, MU — wait for the §5 AI-capex-flush tripwire to restore margin of safety. AVOID/PASS (weak fit, refuted, pre-revenue, or asymmetric to the downside): NVTS (Skeptic-REFUTED, multi-sourced + shrinking + diluting), MYRG (REFUTED on a stale anchor but residual valuation-stretch + B2B<1.0x stands), POET / AAOI (over-extended optical tail), ATKR (commodity, cap 5), XE / SMR / NNE (pre-revenue SMRs asymmetric to the downside). ROTATION DISCIPLINE: the asymmetry is NOT broadly there now — 42/45 trade above base-case SoP and the catalysts are overwhelmingly FIRED, so this is a wait-and-accumulate-on-weakness theme, not a chase. The honest move is a small VST-anchored CORE plus a shopping list, sized at roughly half a normal theme weight because the whole book is one AI-capex bet.
